mapper.insert: INSERT INTO treatment_plan (patient_id, task_name, description, plan_date, start_time, end_time, location, category, is_completed) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{taskName}, #{description}, #{planDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{category}, #{isCompleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE treatment_plan SET patient_id = #{patientId}, task_name = #{taskName}, description = #{description}, plan_date = #{planDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location}, category = #{category}, is_completed = #{isCompleted} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, task_name, description, plan_date, start_time, end_time, location, category, is_completed, created_at FROM treatment_plan WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, patient_id, task_name, description, plan_date, start_time, end_time, location, category, is_completed, created_at FROM treatment_plan ORDER BY plan_date, start_time

SELECT id, patient_id, task_name, description, plan_date, start_time, end_time, location, category, is_completed, created_at FROM treatment_plan WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND plan_date = #{planDate} ORDER BY start_time

SELECT id, patient_id, task_name, description, plan_date, start_time, end_time, location, category, is_completed, created_at FROM treatment_plan WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND plan_date >= #{startDate} AND plan_date <= #{endDate} AND category <> 'MEAL' ORDER BY plan_date, start_time
